name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or an improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem
<!-- What are you trying to do that OpenPraxis doesn't support well today? -->

## Proposed solution
<!-- What should OpenPraxis do? Be concrete: describe the CLI, MCP tool, dashboard change, or API shape you want. -->

## Alternatives considered
<!-- Other approaches you thought about and why they aren't as good. -->

## Who benefits
<!-- Which users (solo coder, team peer-sync, specific agent integration) benefit and how. -->

## Additional context
<!-- Links to related issues, PRs, manifests, or external references. -->
